dryRunResult.notes: Dry run correctly reports the canonical Swahili PAYE alias and marks that no page pack exists.

realWriterStatus.reason: Prior review gate confirms the actual write path still uses buildOutputPath(pagePath, lang), so a real page-pack build is not safe until writer routing and overwrite protection are implemented.

validation.validateHreflang: pass exit 0 with carried reciprocal warnings

verdict: dry-run route safety is verified for PAYE metadata planning, but route-safe page packs are not yet feasible for real builds.
